task: Resolve Turtle paper residual risks for IBKR Gateway and Mac Mini dirty state

governance_bootstrap.summary: Trading runtime and completion reports require real verification and high-risk production cleanup must avoid unsafe direct resets.
Completion requires real runtime entrypoint verification, dirty-state evidence, and explicit residual risk reporting.

scope: Mac Mini IBKR paper runtime status
Mac Mini installed LaunchAgents for turtle and IBKR auto traders
changes: Verified IBKR Gateway on Mac Mini instead of local MBP.
Reinstalled Mac Mini turtle and IBKR LaunchAgent plists from origin/main templates.
Reloaded both LaunchAgents and verified entry-lock environment variables at runtime.
Documented that global Mac Mini dirty worktree is outside turtle scope and should not be reset without a separate cleanup window.

verification.name: Mac Mini IBKR paper runtime status
verification.result: passed: connected to 127.0.0.1:4002, account DUQ416334 detected, NAV and cash read, broker-state match passed, SPY bars smoke test passed

verification.name: Mac Mini LaunchAgent reinstall
verification.command: sed deployed templates into ~/Library/LaunchAgents, plutil -lint, launchctl bootout/bootstrap for turtle and IBKR auto traders
verification.result: passed: both installed plists linted OK and both LaunchAgents reloaded

verification.name: Mac Mini entry lock runtime verification
verification.result: passed: turtle has PAPER_TRADING_MAX_POSITIONS=0, PAPER_PYRAMID_ENABLED=false, PAPER_TRADING_AUTO_EXECUTE=false; IBKR has PAPER_TRADING_MAX_POSITIONS=0 and PAPER_PYRAMID_ENABLED=false

verification.name: Mac Mini target file origin check
verification.command: git diff --quiet origin/main -- four turtle closeout paths
verification.result: passed: all turtle closeout target files match origin/main

verification.name: Mac Mini dirty audit
verification.command: git status counts plus git diff --cached --name-status origin/main and git diff --name-status origin/main
verification.result: residual risk: global dirty state remains unrelated to turtle scope; broad cleanup was not performed to avoid overwriting concurrent work

residual_risk: Global Mac Mini worktree remains dirty outside the turtle paper closeout scope.
A separate owner-approved cleanup window is required before broad Mac Mini worktree reconciliation.
